business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC-KCB-2025-5580; Effective Date 08/01/2025; 13 claims in 2024, no cancellation

positives: Return-to-work or modified duty program in place
OSHA 300 logs maintained and regular job-site safety audits conducted
42 years in business with 28 years under current management
Sprinkler systems present at 4 of 5 locations
Applicant performs demolition or blasting operations (disclosed)
concerns: No written contracts with all subcontractors
Certificates of insurance not required from all subcontractors before work begins
Hold-harmless agreements not obtained from all subcontractors
Hazardous materials used or encountered in operations
Increasing claims trend: 4 claims (2022), 10 claims (2023), 13 claims (2024)
Policy cancellation occurred in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group
LOC-005 warehouse (28,000 sq ft) is not sprinklered
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three-year loss history: 2022 - 4 claims ($1,369,245.71 premium, cancelled); 2023 - 10 claims ($1,476,849.96 premium, no cancellation); 2024 - 13 claims ($1,634,721.63 premium, no cancellation). Claims trending upward year over year.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Hours of Operation: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 3:30 PM. Three largest projects in past 3 years: 1) $1.2M restaurant build-out, 2) $800K medical office renovation, 3) $650K church addition.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Formal written safety program: Yes. Return-to-work or modified duty program: Yes. OSHA 300 logs maintained and regular job-site safety audits conducted: Yes. Demolition or blasting operations performed: Yes.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2024 (Nationwide Insurance): 13 claims, premium $1,634,721.63, no cancellation. 2023 (Berkshire Hathaway Guard): 10 claims, premium $1,476,849.96, no cancellation. 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group): 4 claims, premium $1,369,245.71, cancellation: Yes.
